response.justification: Exceptional experience (19+ years) far exceeds the 6+ year requirement. Current role at re:cinq includes AI agent infrastructure and MCP code generator frameworks—a direct match for the stated AI development requirement. Strong fundamentals in TypeScript, Node.js, AWS (CDK), Docker, Kubernetes, and software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD). Primary-stack frameworks React and Vitest are not explicitly mentioned, but extensive frontend experience (Ember.js, iOS/tvOS apps) and demonstrated testing methodology expertise suggest rapid capability to learn framework-specific tooling.
strengths: Current role directly aligns with AI agent development requirement (MCP frameworks, agentic workflows at re:cinq)
19+ years of professional experience with multiple staff/senior roles in TypeScript/Node.js across microservices and infrastructure-heavy companies
Proven software craftsmanship fundamentals: TDD advocate, CI/CD practices, Docker/Kubernetes expertise, and AWS cloud platform experience
concerns: React not explicitly mentioned despite being primary-stack technology; frontend experience limited to Ember.js and iOS/tvOS apps
Specific testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) not listed despite demonstrated TDD focus and testing expertise
Nest.js framework not mentioned; secondary requirements (Kotlin, Python, GCP/Azure) absent from skills and employment history

key_factors.factor: Current AI agent/MCP development aligns with stated requirement
React framework expertise not explicitly demonstrated
19+ years experience with staff-level roles vs. 6+ year requirement
